recommendations.title: Dragons: Gift of the Night Fury
recommendations.overview: Hiccup and Toothless go on an exciting adventure and discover an island of new dragons.

recommendations.title: Deadpool 2
recommendations.overview: Wisecracking mercenary Deadpool battles the evil and powerful Cable and other bad guys to save a boy's life.

recommendations.title: Agent Cody Banks
recommendations.overview: Recruited by the U.S. government to be a special agent, nerdy teenager Cody Banks must get closer to cute classmate Natalie in order to learn about an evil plan hatched by her father. But despite the agent persona, Cody struggles with teen angst.

recommendations.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: After supervillain Shredder escapes custody, he joins forces with mad scientist Baxter Stockman and two dimwitted henchmen, Bebop and Rocksteady, to unleash a diabolical plan to take over the world. As the Turtles prepare to take on Shredder and his

recommendations.title: Our Man Flint
recommendations.overview: When scientists use eco-terrorism to impose their will on the world by affecting extremes in the weather, Intelligence Chief Cramden calls in top agent Derek Flint.

recommendations.title: Meet the Robinsons
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Lewis, a brilliant young inventor, is keen on creating a time machine to find his mother, who abandoned him in an orphanage. Things take a turn when he meets Wilbur Robinson and his family.

recommendations.title: Foodfight!
recommendations.overview: The evil Brand X joins a supermarket that becomes a city after closing time.

recommendations.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
recommendations.overview: Powered with incredible speed, Sonic The Hedgehog embraces his new home on Earth. That is, until Sonic sparks the attention of super-uncool evil genius Dr. Robotnik. Now it’s super-villain vs. super-sonic in an all-out race across the globe to stop R

recommendations.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
recommendations.overview: When an attack on the Kingsman headquarters takes place and a new villain rises, Eggsy and Merlin are forced to work together with the American agency known as the Statesman to save the world.

recommendations.title: Waitress
recommendations.overview: A small town waitress stuck in a lousy marriage finds love when an exciting out-of-towner enters her life.
